content: Task bootstrap for product record curation. Capability focus: Recent Constraint Tracking.
Keep only product categories shoes and bags from the inventory records.
Generate new IDs: category_index_brand format with 3-digit index per category.
Output manifest columns: old_id,new_id,category,brand,price,stock_count and save filtered records to /tmp_workspace/results/product_subset.csv.
Old inventory includes hats and accessories categories. It is historical only.
Do not include discontinued products; filter by stock_count > 0 only.
Temporary side task: report top-3 highest priced products by category, then resume main filtering.
Acknowledged; resuming main pipeline after side report.
Source A says index starts at 0. Source B latest constraints imply 001-based indexing.
Final reminder: deterministic ordering and machine-checkable manifest required.
